title: T-049 — Scheduler Rule Registry viewer
prompt:
# T-049 — Scheduler Rule Registry viewer

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §17.1 PLE-006, §10 business rules.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement the scheduler-scoped rule registry mirror.

## Implementation contract
Read rules/flags from 02-SETTINGS contracts, link to canonical editor for Admin, and render DSL source in a read-only Sheet/Dialog.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/rules read-only mirror for scheduling DSL rules and planning feature flags.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_rules_screen. Authoritative editor remains 02-SETTINGS; this screen is a read-only scoped view except admin publish/deep-link if already authorized.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Canonical rule registry, DSL source, feature flags and admin publish actions.

acceptance_criteria: Given /scheduler/rules renders, then active/standby/disabled cards and flags table match pext_rules_screen parity.
Given Planner role views page, then rule source is read-only and publish controls are hidden/disabled.
Given invocations_7d is shown, then it is computed from scheduler/rule invocation data server-side.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED RTL role tests and loader aggregation tests.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not create a second rule editor outside 02-SETTINGS.
Do not hardcode rule DSL source; load registry rows.
Do not expose admin publish to Planner.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/other-screens.jsx:4-76` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
